name: advantage-filter

source_inputs.path: 个人优势定位方法论反向抽象.md
source_inputs.label: file-backed fixture

output_contract: 完整定位资产（仅在明确完整方案请求时）
near_neighbor_exclusions: 完整账号定位方案仅在明确请求时走本 skill 的完整方案路径
平台起号、涨粉、爆款运营应转向对应平台 launch expert
纯内容选题不应伪装成优势定位
纯心理测评、职业性格测试、情绪疗愈不属于本 skill 主边界
rollback_boundary: Revert changes under .claude/skills/advantage-filter plus the related tasks/todo.md review entry.
approval_record: user requested an independent, easy-to-invoke local skill based on the source methodology
